description: Figure 3 Vamsapriya zhaotongensis (GMB6401, holotype). A. Type material; B. Ascomata on the host surface; C. Cross-section of ascoma; D, E. Longitudinal sections of ascomata; F. Peridium; G. Paraphyses; H. A J+ subapical ring bluing in Melzer's reagent; I, J. Ascospores; K–N. Asci. Scale bars: 1 mm (B–D); 100 μm (E); 10 μm (F–N).
